name: ScienceSwarm Literature Landscape
description: Map the literature around a research idea using supplied and searched sources, identifying canonical anchors, closest prior art, frontier work, disagreements, gaps, and publishable positioning.
summary: A literature-positioning skill for scientists, mathematicians, social scientists, and engineers. Produces a saved Literature Landscape Map with search strategy, source corpus, prior-art map, disagreements, novelty risks, positioning options, and read-next priorities.
